recommendations.title: Swades
recommendations.overview: A successful Indian scientist returns home to his village to take his nanny back to America with him, and in the process rediscovers his roots.

recommendations.title: Something from Tiffany's
recommendations.overview: One woman's life is forever changed by an engagement ring meant for someone else.

recommendations.title: The Smurfs: A Christmas Carol
recommendations.overview: When Grouchy Smurf behaves badly to everyone and refuses to celebrate Christmas, the Smurfs of Christmas Past, Present and Future teach him to appreciate Christmas.

recommendations.title: Barbershop 2: Back in Business
recommendations.overview: The continuing adventures of the barbers at Calvin's Barbershop. Gina, a stylist at the beauty shop next door, is now trying to cut in on his business. Calvin is again struggling to keep his father's shop and traditions alive--this time against urban

recommendations.title: Patrick
recommendations.overview: A woman's chaotic life becomes more complicated when she inherits her grandmother's dog.

recommendations.title: Ruby Sparks
recommendations.overview: Calvin is a young novelist who achieved phenomenal success early in his career but is now struggling with his writing – as well as his romantic life. Finally, he makes a breakthrough and creates a character named Ruby who inspires him. When Calvin fi

recommendations.title: Undertow
recommendations.overview: A married fisherman struggles to reconcile his devotion to his male lover within his town's rigid traditions.

recommendations.title: Lion
recommendations.overview: A five-year-old Indian boy gets lost on the streets of Calcutta, thousands of kilometers from home. He survives many challenges before being adopted by a couple in Australia; 25 years later, he sets out to find his lost family.

recommendations.title: Sir
recommendations.overview: A prosperous young Indian man falls in love with his servant, a widow with the dream of becoming a fashion designer.

recommendations.title: Laurel Canyon
recommendations.overview: When an uptight young man and his fiancée move into his libertine mother's house, the resulting clash of life attitudes shakes everyone up.
